title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 84.870 - Police officer — holidays
text:
84.870.  Police officer — holidays. — That the board of police commissioners in cities of one hundred thousand inhabitants and over shall grant each and every metropolitan police officer, in active service, twenty-four days a year.
(RSMo 1939 § 7585) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7442; 1919 § 8850; 1909 § 9699
